message:
feat(tui): add unified inbox/outbox explorer screen (br-3vwi.5.1)

New 12th TUI screen providing cross-project mailbox browsing with
direction-aware filtering (All/Inbox/Outbox), sort modes (Newest/
Oldest/Subject/Sender), grouping (Flat/Project/Thread/Sender), and
ack-status filters. Reuses type definitions from mail_explorer DB
layer. Includes 26 unit tests, palette action wiring, deep-link
routing (ExplorerForAgent), and inspector integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
